title: Geopolitical Uncertainty
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
In recent years, geopolitical uncertainty has been a defining characteristic of the global landscape. The recent election of the U.S. President has been followed by numerous announcements regarding tariffs, including the latest imposition of a 25% tax on all steel and aluminum imports into the country, further exacerbating this uncertainty.
